name: Work Agent
description: Unified search across Gmail/Calendar/Drive/Telegram/WhatsApp — plus send, schedule, report, interactive UI, and system health monitoring.

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily API key for web search (falls back to TAVILY_API_KEY env var)

amplitudeMcpUrl.description: Amplitude MCP server URL (default: https://mcp.amplitude.com). For legacy sidecar, set to sidecar URL.

sidecarAuthToken.description: Shared auth token for internal sidecar communication (X-Internal-Token header)

amplitudeOAuthClientId.description: OAuth client_id for Amplitude MCP server (from gen_amplitude_token.py)

amplitudeOAuthAccessToken.description: OAuth access_token for Amplitude MCP server (auto-refreshed at runtime)

amplitudeOAuthRefreshToken.description: OAuth refresh_token for Amplitude MCP server

databaseUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection string for direct DB access (pg_dump, etc.)

tallyApiKey.description: Tally.so API key for form submissions (falls back to TALLY_API_KEY env var)

slackAlertChannel.description: Slack channel or user ID for health/backup alerts (default: U0AH7S5AG91)

backupAccount.description: Google account email for Drive backups (default: kirill@sirenko.ru)

backupRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain backups on Google Drive (default: 14)

mcpServerUrl.label: Google MCP Server URL
mcpServerUrl.help: HTTP endpoint of the google-mcp-sidecar service

telegramSidecarUrl.label: Telegram Sidecar URL
telegramSidecarUrl.help: HTTP endpoint of the telegram-sidecar search API

tavilyApiKey.label: Tavily API Key
tavilyApiKey.help: API key from app.tavily.com for web search

amplitudeMcpUrl.label: Amplitude MCP URL
amplitudeMcpUrl.help: Official: https://mcp.amplitude.com (OAuth). Legacy: custom sidecar URL.
